skipped.message: Reason: package_version(paste(R.version$major, R.version$minor, sep = ".")) <= package_version("4.5.0") is not TRUE ('test-ard_strata.R:73:3')
Reason: package_version(paste(R.version$major, R.version$minor, sep = ".")) <= package_version("4.5.0") is not TRUE ('test-ard_tabulate_value.R:39:3')

testcase.name: compare_ard_errors_when_keys_are_empty
testcase.system-out: Subsetting quosures with `[[` is deprecated as of rlang 0.4.0 Please use `quo_get_expr()` instead. Backtrace: ▆ 1. ├─testthat::expect_error(compare_ard(ard1, ard2, keys = "nonexistent_col")) at test-compare_ard.R:111:3 2. │ └─testthat:::expect_condition_matching_(...) 3. │ └─testthat:::quasi_capture(...) 4. │ ├─testthat (local) .capture(...) 5. │ │ └─base::withCallingHandlers(...) 6. │ └─rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 7. └─cards::compare_ard(ard1, ard2, keys = "nonexistent_col") 8. └─cards:::.process_keys_arg(...) 9. ├─base::intersect(...) 10. └─cards::cards_select(...) 11. └─base::tryCatch(...) 12. └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 13. └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 14. └─value[[3L]](cond) 15. ├─base::tryCatch(...) 16. │ └─base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 17. │ └─base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 18. │ └─base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 19. ├─base::eval(as.list(enexpr)[[1]]) 20. ├─as.list(enexpr)[[1]] 21. └─rlang:::`[[.quosure`(as.list(enexpr), 1) 22. └─rlang:::deprecate_soft(...) 23. └─rlang:::.rlang_lifecycle_deprecate_warn0(...)
